## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Related issue

Closes #…

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] `make check` passes (ruff, black, mypy, pytest)
- [ ] Frontend checks pass if `frontend/` changed (`lint` / `typecheck` / `test` / `build`)
- [ ] Docs updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] **No secrets, `.env`, or real API keys committed**
- [ ] **No raw data or model weights committed**
- [ ] **No mock/sample metrics presented as real results**
- [ ] `python scripts/final_repo_check.py` passes

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on, plus any follow-ups (e.g. pending GPU run).
